title: 5 disciplines that build the man nobody sees yet
caption:
God builds in the dark, in the boring, in the before-anyone-claps.

Not in the big conference moment. Not in the emotional worship night — though those matter. In the Tuesday morning when you got up anyway. In the phone you put down for the sixth time this week. In the conversation with your brother where you named the thing you hadn't named out loud yet.

Five disciplines. Not because discipline is the point — but because this is what it looks like when Christ has hold of a man.

The Word before the world. Go before you feel ready. Confess to a real man. Govern the phone. Show up without an audience.

"He who began a good work in you will bring it to completion." — Philippians 1:6. That's the promise. The disciplines are your side of the partnership.

The man no one sees yet — God's building him right now. Don't waste the construction.

—

Comment "build" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #thework #christianity #scripture
